prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为10628→38492→16173→17747→37149，波动剧烈。2022年出现断档至38492后2023年回弹至16173；2025年再次大幅下 滑至37149，较2024年暴跌约19402名，属异常波动。2025年基准位次约37149名；2021–2023年理科计划40人，2024–2025年物理类计划38人，2026年计划3 8人，连续三年持平，无扩缩招变化，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津医科大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第60名，近年排名稳定在55–6 7名之间，是独立医科大学中唯一的211院校，层次稳固；该校在声誉评价中无显著负面舆情，抖音热度排名第78位（评价为一般），未出现投档线断档或暴跌记 录。2025年位次异常下滑主要受专业组细分及选科要求影响，非声誉事件所致，2026年报考心理有望回归理性；临床医学、口腔医学、基础医学、药学等为该校 传统优势方向，虽第五轮学科评估数据未覆盖该校，但作为老牌医科211，医学学科整体实力强劲，对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学类 专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中持续处于高热推荐/推荐级别，社会报考热情不减；安徽省2026年普通高考总人数约451000人，较2025年462179人减少约2.4%，物理类估算约31 3445人，竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次异常大幅下滑后的回弹预期、招生计划持平、医学类专业持续高热及本省考生总数 略减等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次将较2025年明显前移（竞争加剧），预测最低位次约35292名，区间34792–35792名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 10628 → 38492 → 16173 → 17747 → 37149, with drastic fluctuations. In 2022, there was a gap to 38492, then rebounded to 16173 in 2023; in 2025, it dropped sharply again to 37149, a plunge of about 19402 places compared to 2024, indicating abnormal volatility. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 37149; the science enrollment plan was 40 from 2021 to 2023, and the Physics Category plan was 38 in 2024 and 2025, with 38 planned for 2026, remaining unchanged for three consecutive years, with no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin Medical University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 60th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings between 55 and 67 in recent years. It is the only 211 university among independent medical schools, with a solid standing; there is no significant negative public opinion in reputation evaluations, with a Douyin popularity ranking of 78th (rated as average), and no records of admission cutoff line gaps or crashes. The abnormal decline in 2025 rankings is mainly due to the subdivision of major groups and subject selection requirements, not reputation events, and the application psychology in 2026 is expected to return to rationality; clinical medicine, stomatology, basic medicine, pharmacy, etc., are its traditional advantageous directions. Although the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not cover this university, as a long-established medical 211, the overall strength of medical disciplines is strong, maintaining a sustained appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology have remained at high heat/recommended levels in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with unabated social application enthusiasm; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 451,000, a decrease of about 2.4% from 462,179 in 2025, with an estimated 313,445 in the Physics Category, slightly easing competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the expected rebound after the abnormal sharp decline in 2025 rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan, the sustained high popularity of medical majors, and the slight decrease in the total number of candidates in the province, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will significantly move forward compared to 2025 (increased competition), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 35292, in the range of 34792–35792.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 34792–35792, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 flagship majors (5+3 integrated programs) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 34000), focus on reaching for high-level majors such as Clinical Medicine 5+3 Integrated Program and Stomatology 5+3 Integrated Program; for rankings close to the upper limit of the range (outside 35700), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to secure admission to the university.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2024–2025年历史类最低位次分别为4526→5498，后移约972名，呈逐年下滑趋势；2025年基准位次约5498名。2021–2023年该校在安徽无文科招生记录；2024–2025年历史类计划均为2人，2026年计划仍为2人，连续三年持平，仅设公共事业管理1个专业，招生规模极小，位次易受个别考生填报行为扰动。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津医科大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科排名2026年第60名，层次稳固，对历史类考生同样具有211品牌吸引力；该校声誉评价平稳，无明显负面 舆情；抖音热度一般。历史类仅1个非医学专业（公共事业管理），专业吸引力有限；公共事业管理非该校优势学科，无对应A类学科评估支撑，报考热度主要依 赖学校211层次而非专业实力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 公共事业管理属管理类，社会热度一般观望；安徽省2026年历史类考生估算约137555人，较2025年141400人减少约2.7%， 竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次后移趋势、招生计划持平、仅1个非医学专业且考生总数略减等因素，预计2026年历史类最低位 次将较2025年小幅前移（竞争略加剧），预测最低位次约5398名，区间4898–5898名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 公共事业管理。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 历史类仅公共事业管理1个招生专业，无分档空间。位次在预测区间4898–5898名以内均可考虑填报，位次优于区间下限（4900名以内）录取概率较高；位次接近区间上限（5800 名以外）可作为冲刺。建议同时关注其他院校的多元专业选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum rankings for the History Category in 2024–2025 were 4526 → 5498, shifting backward by approximately 972 places, showing a year-on-year decline; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5498. From 2021 to 2023, the university had no liberal arts enrollment records in Anhui; the History Category enrollment plan was 2 students in both 2024 and 2025, and remains 2 students for 2026, unchanged for three consecutive years, with only one major (Public Affairs Management), making the enrollment scale extremely small and rankings susceptible to fluctuations due to individual applicant choices.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin Medical University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university, ranked 60th in the 2026 Soft Science Rankings, with a solid level that also attracts History Category applicants due to its 211 brand; its reputation is stable with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average. The History Category offers only one non-medical major (Public Affairs Management), which has limited appeal; Public Affairs Management is not a strength of the university, with no corresponding A-level discipline evaluation support, so application enthusiasm mainly relies on the university's 211 level rather than the major's strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Public Affairs Management belongs to the management category, with generally average social popularity; the estimated number of History Category applicants in Anhui Province for 2026 is about 137,555, a decrease of approximately 2.7% from 141,400 in 2025, slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of rankings in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan, only one non-medical major, and a slight decrease in total applicants, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the History Category in 2026 will move slightly forward (competition slightly intensifies), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 5398, and a range of 4898–5898.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Public Affairs Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The History Category has only one enrollment major, Public Affairs Management, with no room for tier differentiation. Applicants with rankings within the predicted range of 4898–5898 can consider applying; those with rankings better than the lower limit of the range (within 4900) have a higher probability of admission; those with rankings near the upper limit of the range (outside 5800) can use it as a reach. It is recommended to also consider other universities with diverse major options.
